# feat(flutter): configurable backend URL + test accounts

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.

**Commit**: `5c424b38ab02` — feat(flutter): configurable backend URL + test accounts

**Body**:

Backend URL is now stored in SharedPreferences and configurable
at runtime via Settings screen (gear icon on login screen).
No rebuild needed to point to a different server.

New test accounts seeded:
- Tourist: test@wanderless.com / wanderless123
- Guide:   guide@wanderless.com / wanderless123

Settings screen shows quick-link IPs for Android emulator,
same-WiFi, and remote deployments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
